user.title: Set up weekly library events
user.description: Choose the child and branches. Home Assistant will keep the calendar and weekly digest content age appropriate automatically.

data_description.filter_mode: Recommended balances age fit with family-friendly options. Strict includes only explicit best matches; Broad includes more general children's events.
data_description.calendar_duration_minutes: Used only when the library does not publish an end time.
data_description.scan_interval_seconds: Six hours (21600 seconds) is recommended. The render action refreshes again by default immediately before generating the digest.

error.invalid_child_name: Enter a first name of 80 characters or fewer.
error.birth_date_in_future: Birth date cannot be in the future.
error.branch_required: Select at least one library branch.
error.invalid_calendar_duration: Calendar duration must be between 15 and 240 minutes.
error.invalid_scan_interval: Refresh interval must be between 900 and 86400 seconds.
error.invalid_config: Check the settings and try again.

abort.already_configured: Free Library Events is already configured. Use Configure to change its settings.
